Author: Market Assistant Dev
Name: Market Master Pro
Punchline: Manual market intelligence and arbitrage scanner for FFXIV.
Description: Analyzes market opportunities with Universalis data, watchlists, velocity filters, and manual undercut helpers. All actions are manual. Now includes real-time undercut notifications.
Changelog:
v1.1.36: Installer reliability hotfix - release asset now uses a versioned filename to avoid stale CDN cache and ensure distributed package version matches feed version.
v1.1.35: Reissued release package on a fresh tag to bypass stale CDN artifact and restore install/update reliability for latest opportunities persistence update.
v1.1.34: Scanner now persists the most recent opportunities and keeps them visible until a new scan completes; latest opportunity snapshot is restored on startup.
v1.1.33: Stability pass: opportunities table now supports row caps, compact mode, and optional detailed tooltips; exclusion inspector now uses TTL caching with refresh debounce; added pluginmaster feed validation script for safer releases.

Author: Market Assistant Dev
Name: Armoury Cleaner
Punchline: Filter and discard unwanted gear from your armoury chest.
Description: Define filters by job, minimum/maximum level, and item level. Armoury Cleaner will scan each gear slot and safely discard only items that match all active filters.
Changelog:
v1.0.7: UI redesign — removed Auto-Discard toggle; separate Move To Inventory and Discard All buttons; both now use random 800-1100ms delays; direct discard from armoury is the default for Discard All.
v1.0.6: Direct discard from armoury option.
v1.0.5: Latest stable release with improved discard timing.
v1.0.4: Discard All uses random 800-1100ms delay between items.
v1.0.3: Auto-Discard mode via InventoryManager.

Author: Market Assistant Dev
Name: QuestNav

v1.1.4: Fixed quest lookup with improved error handling.
v1.1.3: Arrow background opacity slider.
v1.1.2: Fix arrow overlay visibility.
